diagnosis: Two-head ignore-index cross-entropy from GPT-J inference. Same pattern as amax_sum_sum_2a28fce37306 (training variant) but without the fill scalar input. Oracle uses online logsumexp to compute both heads' NLL losses in one kernel without materializing log-softmax rows. 1.62x real gap (3.1us absolute) confirms the NEW_PATTERN opportunity for fused xent lowering.
